problem: What is the actual neurobiological mechanism of depression — serotonin alone is insufficient
hypothesis: If Neuroinflammation reduction via microglial targeting is applied to alone, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
